title: Perform fire pouring techniques
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform fire pouring techniques demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Plan work for shift

pcs.text: Review job requests to identify the samples, preparation methods required for each, and shift priorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review job requests to identify the samples, preparation methods required for each, and shift priorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review job requests to identify the samples, preparation methods required for each, and shift priorities.

pcs.text: Identify hazards, safety equipment/procedures associated with samples, preparation methods, reagents and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, safety equipment/procedures associated with samples, preparation methods, reagents and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, safety equipment/procedures associated with samples, preparation methods, reagents and equipment.

pcs.text: Plan parallel work sequences to optimise the throughput of multiple sets of samples during shift
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan parallel work sequences to optimise the throughput of multiple sets of samples during shift?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan parallel work sequences to optimise the throughput of multiple sets of samples during shift.

pcs.text: Assemble all required equipment, materials, reagents and check they are fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble all required equipment, materials, reagents and check they are fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble all required equipment, materials, reagents and check they are fit for purpose.

pcs.text: Check pots and cupels and discard those with faults and/or a record of high gold values
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check pots and cupels and discard those with faults and/or a record of high gold values?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check pots and cupels and discard those with faults and/or a record of high gold values.

pcs.text: Check that fusion and muffle furnaces are operating at the specified temperatures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that fusion and muffle furnaces are operating at the specified temperatures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that fusion and muffle furnaces are operating at the specified temperatures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan work for shift

elements.title: Prepare sample racks for fusion

pcs.text: Check samples against accompanying documentation and record/report any discrepancies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check samples against accompanying documentation and record/report any discrepancies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check samples against accompanying documentation and record/report any discrepancies.

pcs.text: Conduct simple visual/chemical tests for each sample to assess the adequacy of prior sample preparation and possible presence of sulphides or other mineralogy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct simple visual/chemical tests for each sample to assess the adequacy of prior sample preparation and possible presence of sulphides or other mineralogy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct simple visual/chemical tests for each sample to assess the adequacy of prior sample preparation and possible presence of sulphides or other mineralogy.

pcs.text: Weigh out the recommended amount of sample and add specified identifier to maintain orientation, as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Weigh out the recommended amount of sample and add specified identifier to maintain orientation, as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh out the recommended amount of sample and add specified identifier to maintain orientation, as necessary.

pcs.text: Weigh out flux components, mix thoroughly with the sample charge and transfer to recommended type and size of pot without loss of material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Weigh out flux components, mix thoroughly with the sample charge and transfer to recommended type and size of pot without loss of material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weigh out flux components, mix thoroughly with the sample charge and transfer to recommended type and size of pot without loss of material.

pcs.text: Place pots in racks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place pots in racks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place pots in racks.

pcs.text: Record all required details of sample preparation to ensure traceability of samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record all required details of sample preparation to ensure traceability of samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record all required details of sample preparation to ensure traceability of samples.

pcs.text: Seek advice to deal with any situation beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice to deal with any situation beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice to deal with any situation beyond scope of responsibility or knowledge.

elements.title: Obtain acceptable buttons and prills

pcs.text: Maintain sequencing in order to track samples, buttons and prills throughout the recovery process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain sequencing in order to track samples, buttons and prills throughout the recovery process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain sequencing in order to track samples, buttons and prills throughout the recovery process.

pcs.text: Monitor furnace temperature/time to ensure complete sample fusion
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor furnace temperature/time to ensure complete sample fusion?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor furnace temperature/time to ensure complete sample fusion.

pcs.text: Remove fused samples from furnace and pour into moulds with minimal loss of material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove fused samples from furnace and pour into moulds with minimal loss of material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove fused samples from furnace and pour into moulds with minimal loss of material.

pcs.text: Recognise the need for repeat firings due to lead shotting and/or poor fusions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise the need for repeat firings due to lead shotting and/or poor fusions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise the need for repeat firings due to lead shotting and/or poor fusions.

pcs.text: Separate slag and button with minimal loss of collector
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Separate slag and button with minimal loss of collector?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Separate slag and button with minimal loss of collector.

pcs.text: Inspect buttons for matte, brittleness, size and malformed shape
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect buttons for matte, brittleness, size and malformed shape?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect buttons for matte, brittleness, size and malformed shape.

pcs.text: Place acceptable buttons in muffle furnace using cupels that have been previously loaded and preheated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place acceptable buttons in muffle furnace using cupels that have been previously loaded and preheated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place acceptable buttons in muffle furnace using cupels that have been previously loaded and preheated.

pcs.text: Regularly monitor furnace temperature/time/air flow to ensure efficient cupellation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Regularly monitor furnace temperature/time/air flow to ensure efficient cupellation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Regularly monitor furnace temperature/time/air flow to ensure efficient cupellation.

pcs.text: Recover prills, check identifiers and inspect for contamination, losses and evidence of other precious metals (e.g. high gold, Platinum and Palladium)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recover prills, check identifiers and inspect for contamination, losses and evidence of other precious metals (e.g. high gold, Platinum and Palladium)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recover prills, check identifiers and inspect for contamination, losses and evidence of other precious metals (e.g. high gold, Platinum and Palladium).

pcs.text: Complete and collate sample records before presenting prills for analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete and collate sample records before presenting prills for analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete and collate sample records before presenting prills for analysis.
